name: ASUS ROG STRIX X670E-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX X670E-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x
description: Premium gaming AMD AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 support, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 6E for high-end gaming rigs.
